steps.title: Set up the doubling condition
steps.content: Initial population at $t=0$ is $30,000\cdot2^{0}=30,000$. Doubling means \$60,000$. Set $$30,000 \cdot 2^{t/370}=60,000$$ and divide both sides by \$30,000$: $$2^{t/370}=2$$.

steps.title: Solve for t
steps.content:
Since the bases are equal, the exponents must be equal: $$t/370=1$$. Multiply both sides by \$370$: $$t=370$$ minutes.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
